zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏空
zh.content:
当前XRP/USD价格处于1.09742，略低于20日均线1.11138，显示短期承压。价格在日内高低点1.10103与1.09266之间波动，表明多空力量较为均衡，但下行压力略显。若价格持续在均线下方运行，短线偏空趋势可能延续。  

MACD为-0.01268，且Signal未形成，但负值显示空头动能存在。RSI数据不可用，但结合价格与均线关系可推测短期超买压力有限，行情可能以震荡为主，若MACD继续走弱，可能触发进一步下探。  

关键支撑位关注1.0925附近，若跌破该水平，可能打开下行空间至1.0850一线；阻力位在1.1010至1.1110区间，多头若能突破此区域，将有望重回上升趋势。短线可关注震荡区间操作，避免追高。  

交易策略上，建议空头以突破支撑为入场信号，止损可设在1.1020以上；多头则等待价格回踩支撑确认反弹再进场，严格控制仓位，结合日内波动进行短线操作，保持风控为先。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD is trading at 1.09742, holding near the lower end of its recent 24-hour range between 1.09266 and 1.10103. The pair remains under mild bearish pressure after slipping below its 20-period simple moving average at 1.11138, a sign that short-term momentum currently favors sellers. While the daily decline of 0.51% is modest, the inability to reclaim higher levels suggests that buyers are still struggling to establish a sustained recovery.

The technical picture leans cautiously negative. The MACD value of -0.012681098 indicates weakening momentum and reflects a market that has yet to generate a convincing bullish reversal signal. RSI data is unavailable, limiting confirmation from momentum oscillators, but price action relative to the SMA suggests a soft downtrend remains intact. Unless XRP can move back above the moving average, rallies may continue to attract profit-taking and short-term selling pressure.

From a support and resistance perspective, the immediate support zone sits around 1.09266, the recent session low. A break below that area could expose additional downside and potentially accelerate bearish sentiment. On the upside, resistance is visible near 1.10103, followed by the more significant barrier around the SMA(20) at 1.11138. A decisive close above these levels would improve the short-term outlook and indicate that buying interest is strengthening.

Traders may consider a cautious approach while price remains below the moving average. Conservative participants could wait for either a confirmed breakout above 1.11138 or a successful retest of support before initiating new positions. Short-term traders may look for range-based opportunities between support and resistance, while maintaining disciplined risk management. Given the current momentum profile, protecting capital and avoiding oversized positions remains important until a clearer directional signal emerges.
